description: Plugin-distributed hooks for performance-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable performance anti-patterns (a target/NFR with no load or no percentile, an average-latency assertion instead of a percentile, a load test that pins no think time / arrival rate, a regression claim with no baseline). Set PERF_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
